# Google Cloud Pub/Sub

Imports Google Cloud Pub/Sub topics and subscriptions as Dagster assets for observing message queue status and throughput. Each topic and subscription becomes an observable asset; materialization records metadata about the queue configuration.

## Required packages

```
google-cloud-pubsub>=2.18.0
google-auth>=2.17.0
```

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `project_id` | `str` | GCP project ID |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `poll_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Sensor poll interval in seconds |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"google_pubsub"` | Asset group name for all imported assets |
| `description` | `str` | — | Description for the Google Pub/Sub component |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `filter_by_name_pattern` | `str` | — | Regex pattern to filter entities by name |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `credentials_path` | `str` | — | Path to GCP service account credentials JSON file (optional) |
| `import_topics` | `bool` | `true` | Import Pub/Sub topics as observable assets |
| `import_subscriptions` | `bool` | `true` | Import Pub/Sub subscriptions as observable assets |
| `exclude_name_pattern` | `str` | — | Regex pattern to exclude entities by name |
| `generate_sensor` | `bool` | `true` | Generate observation sensor |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.GooglePubSubComponent
attributes:
  project_id: my-gcp-project
  credentials_path: "{{ env('GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS') }}"
  import_topics: true
  import_subscriptions: true
  filter_by_name_pattern: "^prod-"
  group_name: google_pubsub
```

## Asset Dependencies & Lineage

This component supports a `deps` field for declaring upstream Dagster asset dependencies:

```yaml
attributes:
  # ... other fields ...
  deps:
    - raw_orders              # simple asset key
    - raw/schema/orders       # asset key with path prefix
```

`deps` draws lineage edges in the Dagster asset graph without loading data at runtime. Use it to express that this asset depends on upstream tables or assets produced by other components.

Dependencies can also be wired externally via `map_resolved_asset_specs()` in `definitions.py` — the same approach used by [Dagster Designer](https://github.com/eric-thomas-dagster/dagster_designer).
